Replace ALL example testimonials with these REAL reviews (do NOT change wording):
  1. "Super professional with a ton of experience and knowledge to share. Mr. Cannon has been called upon request numerous time to fix HVAC issues for my employer and he has not yet failed us. Thank you for your great service you've provided to so many peo" — GCutty The Barber
  2. "Did an amazing job Oman ice machine at the church. Would highly recommend him ." — ross carnahan
  3. "I absolutely recommend Cannon Heating and Air. Shane communicated with us closely from setting an arrivial time to finding and repairing the problem to our AC.  He did a great job in service and repair to an old AC unit.  He maintained a professional" — Ann Ingram

Update business hours to:
  Monday: Open 24 hours
  Tuesday: Open 24 hours
  Wednesday: Open 24 hours
  Thursday: Open 24 hours
  Friday: Open 24 hours
  Saturday: Open 24 hours
  Sunday: Open 24 hours


Keep the exact same design, layout, animations, and structure. Only swap the data.
Every tel: link must point to tel:+16019423192. Zero template data remaining.
sites.call_script: Hey, this is Boston with BOSS Systems. I'm building a free demo website for Cannon Heating & Air Service LLC. I already pulled your 38 Google reviews and your 5 stars rating. Anything you want added or changed?

template_prompts.HVAC:
Build a professional, multi-page website for a local HVAC business using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

This is a REUSABLE TEMPLATE. Use the example data below — it will be swapped for real client data later via a remix edit.

BUSINESS DETAILS:
- Name: Patriot Heating & Cooling
- Phone: (555) 123-4567
- Address: 1200 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701
- Type: HVAC
- Tagline: "Keeping Your Family Comfortable Year-Round"
- Rating: 4.9 stars (127 Google reviews)

PAGES TO BUILD: Home, About, Services, Contact, Testimonials

DESIGN:
- Primary accent color: #1E5FBF
- Dark background (#0a0a0a) with the accent color for buttons, headers, and highlights
- Clean, modern, premium — must look like a real $3,000+ professional website
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Use shadcn/ui components throughout

HOME PAGE:
1. HERO: Full-width hero with gradient overlay, business name, tagline "Keeping Your Family Comfortable Year-Round", and a prominent CTA button "Call Now — (555) 123-4567" linking to tel:+15551234567.

2. SERVICES GRID (icon cards):
  - Air Conditioning Repair & Installation
  - Heating System Repair & Installation
  - AC Maintenance & Tune-Ups
  - Ductwork Repair & Cleaning
  - Heat Pump Service
  - Emergency 24/7 HVAC Service

3. TRUST BAR (horizontal strip):
  - 4.9 Star Google Rating
  - 127+ Reviews
  - "Serving Springfield & Surrounding Areas"
  - EPA Certified, Licensed & Insured, NATE Certified

4. WHY CHOOSE US section: 3 columns — "Licensed & Insured", "24/7 Emergency Service", "Satisfaction Guaranteed" with icons.

5. TESTIMONIALS CAROUSEL:
  - "Absolutely the best hvac service in Springfield. They showed up on time, explained everything clearly, and the price was fair. Highly recommend!" — John D.
  - "Called them for an emergency on a Sunday night and they were here within the hour. Professional, friendly, and fixed the problem fast. Five stars!" — Sarah M.
  - "We've used Patriot Heating & Cooling for years. Honest, reliable, and they stand behind their work. Wouldn't call anyone else." — Mike R.

ABOUT PAGE:
- Story section: "Family-owned and operated in Springfield for over 15 years. We treat every customer like family."
- Photo placeholder (solid color block with icon)
- Values: Honesty, Quality, Community

SERVICES PAGE:
- Detailed cards for each service with descriptions
- Each card has a "Call for Free Estimate" CTA linking to tel:+15551234567

CONTACT PAGE:
- Large click-to-call button: tel:+15551234567
- Contact form (Name, Phone, Email, Message) with success state: "We'll call you back within 1 hour!"
- Address: 1200 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701
- Google Maps embed placeholder (solid color block with pin icon)
- Business Hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM, Sun Emergency Only

FOOTER:
- Business name, phone, address
- Quick links to all pages
- "Built by BOSS Systems" linking to https://bosssystems.co
- Privacy Policy link (anchor to a simple inline privacy section)
- Terms of Service link (anchor to a simple inline terms section)

SEO & TECHNICAL:
- JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema in <head>: @type LocalBusiness, name, telephone, address (PostalAddress), aggregateRating (4.9, 127 reviews), openingHours, url, priceRange "$$"
- Open Graph meta tags: og:title, og:description, og:type=website, og:url, og:image (use a CSS-generated preview or solid color placeholder)
- Twitter meta: twitter:card=summary, twitter:title, twitter:description
- Favicon: <link rel="icon"> using an inline SVG data URI matching the accent color
- Google Analytics placeholder comment in <head>: <!-- Replace with client's Google Analytics ID -->
- Click-to-text button alongside click-to-call: sms:+15551234567 with body "Hi, I need a quote"

RULES:
- Zero placeholder text — every word must be real or contextually accurate
- No stock photos — use solid colors, gradients, icons, and CSS patterns
- All phone links must use tel:+15551234567
- Fully responsive, mobile-first
- SEO meta titles and descriptions on every page
- Smooth scroll navigation
- Page transitions / subtle animations
- Accessibility: proper contrast, alt text, semantic HTML, aria-labels on icon buttons
